name: entur
description: Entur platform AI toolbox: reusable skills, agents, and hooks for Entur developers

metadata.description: Coding agent skills and tools for building on the Entur platform

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap a new Entur app: self-service manifests, Helm, Terraform, Docker, and CI/CD wired together with consistent identifiers.

plugins.name: scr
plugins.description: Structure problems and decisions in SCR format (Situation, Complication, Resolution).

plugins.name: cicd-workflows
plugins.description: Generate Entur-standard CI/CD GitHub Actions workflows (ci, build, cd, pr, codeql) for Kotlin/Java, Go, or Python projects.

plugins.name: guides
plugins.description: Routes Entur platform conventions to AI agents on demand. The skill fetches the matching guide from the entur/ai repo so contributors only need to add a markdown file under guides/.
